Title: MdMYB46 could enhance salt and osmotic stress tolerance in apple by directly activating stress-responsive signals

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: cell wall strengthening and stress protection
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive lignin-biosynthesis gene directly activated by MdMYB46
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MdCAD expression increased in MdMYB46-overexpressing apple and decreased in MdMYB46-RNAi apple. 2. MdMYB46 directly bound the MdCAD promoter. 3. MdMYB46 activated MdCAD promoter activity.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; EMSA; ChIP-qPCR; tobacco transient luciferase assay
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Classified as Common_Gene per requested schema because paper treats MdMYB46 as main core regulator; MdCAD is a validated direct downstream gene in lignin metabolism but not primary experimental subject
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential downstream target to reinforce lignin-mediated stress tolerance

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: cell wall strengthening and stress protection
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive lignin-biosynthesis gene directly activated by MdMYB46
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MdCOMT expression increased in MdMYB46-overexpressing apple and decreased in MdMYB46-RNAi apple. 2. MdMYB46 directly bound the MdCOMT promoter. 3. MdMYB46 activated MdCOMT promoter activity.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; EMSA; ChIP-qPCR; tobacco transient luciferase assay
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Validated direct downstream gene in lignin metabolism
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential downstream target to reinforce lignin-mediated stress tolerance

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: stem tissue for lignin; leaves for proline
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: lignin strengthens secondary cell walls and helps reduce water loss under osmotic/salt stress; proline contributes osmotic adjustment and stress tolerance
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Enhances salt and osmotic stress tolerance in apple; increases lignin deposition and proline content; lowers H2O2 and MDA accumulation; reduces water loss
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MdMYB46 is a stress-inducible R2R3-MYB localized in the nucleus with transcriptional activation activity. 2. Overexpression in apple increased tolerance to 200 mM NaCl and 300 mM mannitol, whereas RNAi reduced tolerance. 3. MdMYB46 activated lignin-related genes and increased lignin accumulation. 4. MdMYB46 directly bound promoters of MdMYB58, MdMYB63, MdCAD, MdCOMT and MdCCR. 5. MdMYB46 also directly activated stress-signalling genes MdAREB1A, MdDREB2A, MdRD22 and MdRD29A.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: overexpression; RNAi; qRT-PCR; subcellular localization; yeast transactivation assay; stress phenotyping; lignin/proline/H2O2/MDA measurements; EMSA; ChIP-qPCR; tobacco transient luciferase assay
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Induced by exogenous ABA, NaCl and mannitol in apple
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Induced by exogenous ABA, NaCl and mannitol in apple
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 50 μM ABA; 200 mM NaCl; 300 mM mannitol
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: MdMYB58; MdMYB63; MdCAD; MdCOMT; MdCCR; MdAREB1A; MdDREB2A; MdRD22; MdRD29A
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Directly activates transcription of lignin-biosynthetic/regulatory genes and stress-responsive genes by binding SMRE, M46RE and MYBCORE motifs in their promoters
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Key positive regulator linking secondary cell wall/lignin biosynthesis with ABA-dependent and ABA-independent stress signalling to improve salt and osmotic stress tolerance
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: secondary cell wall biosynthesis; lignin deposition; stress-responsive signalling associated with osmotic adjustment
Regulation_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: MdMYB58; MdMYB63; MdCAD; MdCOMT; MdCCR; MdAREB1A; MdDREB2A; MdRD22; MdRD29A
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Overexpression caused dwarfism, leaf curling and floral abnormalities in transgenic Arabidopsis, but no obvious morphology change in apple; possible ectopic lignin deposition effects
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Promising engineering target to improve apple salt and osmotic stress tolerance through direct activation of lignin biosynthesis and stress-signalling pathways; constitutive expression may require caution due to growth defects observed in Arabidopsis

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Provides compression strength to cell walls and contributes to stress tolerance
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Acts as a positive lignin-biosynthesis regulator downstream of MdMYB46
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MdMYB58 transcript level increased in MdMYB46-overexpressing apple and decreased in MdMYB46-RNAi apple. 2. MdMYB46 directly bound the MdMYB58 promoter. 3. MdMYB46 activated MdMYB58 promoter activity in tobacco transient assays.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; EMSA; ChIP-qPCR; tobacco transient luciferase assay
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Positive activator of lignin biosynthesis during secondary wall formation (as described in paper background/discussion and used in results context)
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Downstream positive regulator contributing to MdMYB46-mediated lignin deposition
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential downstream target for reinforcing lignification-related stress tolerance

Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; EMSA; ChIP-qPCR; tobacco transient luciferase assay
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Positive activator of lignin biosynthesis during secondary wall formation

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential downstream target for reinforcing lignification-related stress tolerance

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive stress-signalling regulator directly activated by MdMYB46 in the ABA-dependent pathway, contributing to salt/osmotic stress tolerance
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MdAREB1A expression was induced by ABA, NaCl and mannitol. 2. MdAREB1A transcript level positively correlated with MdMYB46 in transgenic apple. 3. MdMYB46 directly bound the MdAREB1A promoter and activated its transcription.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: stress-induced expression analysis; qRT-PCR in OE/RNAi plants; ChIP-qPCR; EMSA; tobacco transient luciferase assay
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: ABA; salt stress; osmotic stress; MdMYB46
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Induced by ABA, NaCl and mannitol
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in MdMYB46-overexpressing apple and under stress
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 50 μM ABA; 200 mM NaCl; 300 mM mannitol
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Functions in ABA-dependent stress signalling; direct downstream target of MdMYB46
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Contributes to activation of ABA-dependent anti-stress responses associated with increased osmotic protection
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: stress signalling linked to osmotic adjustment
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful downstream regulator candidate for improving osmotic/salt tolerance
